headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) Vs The Rest Of The Financial Exchanges & Data Stocks
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q1 financial exchanges & data earnings season.

headline: What's in the Cards for CME Group This Earnings Season?
summary: CME Group's Q2 results are expected to reflect resilient revenue growth from market data and volatility-driven trading despite mixed contract volumes.

headline: The $5.25 billion ETF paying dividends that grew three years straight right now
summary: DIVO has raised its monthly payout three years running and sits on $5.25 billion in assets, but one holding carries a debt load that raises questions about how long the streak can continue.
